question: Based on the chart, how does the total number of visitors at Station Z compare to Station X over all four days combined?

options.A: Station Z has slightly more visitors than Station X overall
options.B: Station Z has about twice as many visitors as Station X overall
options.C: Station Z has fewer visitors than Station X overall
options.D: Station Z and Station X have exactly the same total number of visitors overall

explanation: The y-axis starts at 800 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Station Z look as large as (or larger than) Station X even though the totals favor Station X.
